portfolio.title: Michele TN Projects
portfolio.description: A standalone portfolio page for published project websites. Cards are loaded from the local project.json file.

projects.title: SAP Reverse Proxy Add-on for mitmproxy

projects.description: HTML5 CWP widget for displaying PDF documents in AVEVA Wonderware and System Platform runtimes.

projects.description: JSON-driven HTML5 grid widgets for industrial HMI screens, based on AG Grid and Tabulator.

projects.title: Rebex Tiny Web Server Portable Builder
projects.description: Builder for portable Rebex Tiny Web Server distributions with HTTP, HTTPS, generated certificates, and launch scripts.

projects.title: SingBoxTunGui Encrypted Windows Distribution
projects.description: Packaging workflow for a signed Windows executable distribution with encrypted PowerShell payloads and release checksums.

projects.title: Codex Slash Commands Guide
projects.description: Practical guide to Codex slash commands across desktop, IDE, CLI, and reusable engineering workflows.

projects.title: Secure E-mail Notifications for Fail2Ban
